title: Linear Decision Boundary
text: Logistic Regression can only separate data points using a straight line in the Fan Attendance plane.

title: Best Possible Separation
text: Check whether one straight line can separate the win points from the loss points. When you picture the line, remember that all points on one side would be predicted as wins and all points on the other side would be predicted as losses. If no such line works perfectly, think about the line that makes the fewest mistakes.

title: Compare Possible Splits
text: Try sketching your best line and count how many points each one classifies correctly. Then use that best line to calculate the accuracy by dividing the number of correct classifications by the total number of points.
